name: smart-attendance-final-website
description: Final SmartAttend full-stack website with authentication, role dashboards, scanning, sessions, reports and admin functions.

scripts.reset-data: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='data/db.json'; if(fs.existsSync(p)) fs.rmSync(p); console.log('Data reset. Run npm start to seed again.');"

author: SmartAttend Project Team
